design_philosophy: Pure minimalist. High emphasis on frictionless gameplay, stark contrast, and satisfying motion. No generic cards, no purple gradients. Confident use of white space.

headings.usage: Victory text ('Spectacular!'), Main Menu titles, Level numbers

body.usage: Timers, move counters, stats, buttons, standard UI text

arrow_tile.border: None by default. Active/focus state may have a 1px black outline.

icon.style: Minimalist sharp vector arrow. Not heavily rounded, strictly geometric.

tap_feedback.effect: Scale down to 0.90 using React Native spring physics. Restore to 1.0 on release.

slide_off.effect: Arrow translates along its direction vector (e.g., if pointing right, translateX: +width_of_grid) over 300ms. Use easeOut easing. Opacity transitions to 0 in the final 100ms.

victory_text.effect: Scale from 0.4 to 1.0 with a bounce spring. Opacity from 0 to 1 over 400ms.

confetti.effect: Continuous emission of rectangular and circular particles from the top of the screen. Colors: #0044FF and #FFFFFF. Varying fall speeds and rotation rates.

splash_menu.layout: Vertical stack, perfectly centered. Massive game title in Clash Display. Generous vertical spacing (48px) between title and menu buttons.

level_select.layout: Grid layout (3-4 columns). Handcrafted levels first, then a section for 'Infinite Procedural'.
level_select.tile_style: Square tiles. Completed levels have a thick 2px black border and black text. Locked levels have a 1px light gray border (#D1D1D1) and gray text.

gameplay.header: Flex row. Left: Back/Menu icon. Center: Level Number (bold). Right: Move counter or Timer.
gameplay.body: Centered N x N grid containing the interlocking arrows. Maximize screen width minus padding.
gameplay.footer: Subtle text button for 'Restart' centered at the bottom.

victory.layout: Absolute overlay on top of the cleared grid.
victory.content: Centered text 'Spectacular!' in bold blue (#0044FF) using Clash Display at text-5xl equivalent. Next Level button below it.

stats.layout: Minimalist list view. High contrast black lines separating rows. Displaying Best Times, Levels Completed, and Global Leaderboard rank.

states.loading: A minimal, solid black square that scales up and down or rotates sharply 90 degrees.
states.error: Bold black text: 'Error.' followed by a brief gray description. Single black 'Retry' button.
states.empty: Used for empty leaderboards. Centered text: 'No records.' in #7A7A7A.
